scripts.check: npm run version:check && npm run package:policy && npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run clean && npm run build && npm test && npm run shared:stress && npm run codegen:basic && npm run codegen:scalar-only && npm run codegen:renderer-asset-catalog && npm run codegen:renderer-draw-batch && npm run codegen:renderer-entity-transform && npm run codegen:renderer-grid && npm run codegen:renderer-sprite-atlas
scripts.pack:check: npm pack --dry-run --workspace @exornea/zeno-types && npm pack --dry-run --workspace @exornea/zeno-schema && npm pack --dry-run --workspace @exornea/zeno-runtime && npm pack --dry-run --workspace @exornea/zeno-buffers && npm pack --dry-run --workspace @exornea/zeno-compiler
scripts.bench:check: npm run bench && npm run bench:dynamic && npm run bench:flatbuffers && npm run bench:real-game && npm run bench:renderer-surfaces
scripts.release:check: npm run check && npm run pack:check && npm run consumer:smoke && npm run bench:check
scripts.bench: npm run codegen:basic && npm run build && node --expose-gc ./packages/bench/index.mjs
scripts.browser:smoke: npm run build && npm run example:webgl:build && node ./scripts/browser-smoke.mjs
scripts.browser:smoke:all: npm run browser:smoke && npm run browser:smoke:raw
